platform_decisions.content: Onboarding state uses lodash memoization with early exit conditions (completed, seen 4x, demo mode)
Message mappers handle SDK-internal type translation with asymmetric field naming and 3-anchor segment tracking for compaction
System init conditionally injects UDS messaging socket path for ant-only remote control (not in public SDK types)
Token counting handles parallel tool calls via message ancestry walk-back using message.id sibling detection
Cost session persistence gated by session ID match to prevent cost spillover across sessions
Cost accumulation recursively includes advisor model usage; advisor costs logged separately then added to total
